name: TecPey Production 4 Critical Patches

patches.result: /app/storage is created, owned by nextjs:nodejs, and exposed as a Docker volume.

Broken extra closing paragraph tag removed; local TS parser check on patched files shows no project-code syntax errors after filtering missing dependency errors. Full npm build requires npm ci completion on the target machine.
Shared rate limiter supports Redis REST envs and memory fallback.
Student profile, progress, XP, badges, mentor snapshot and simulator snapshot can sync to PostgreSQL when DATABASE_URL is configured.

known_limitation: The assistant runtime could not complete npm ci within the tool timeout, so full npm run build must be executed on the deployment machine before launch.
